Class GoogleAuthRepositoryImpl

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository.GoogleAuthRepositoryImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
GoogleAuthRepository
@Singleton public class GoogleAuthRepositoryImpl extends Object implements GoogleAuthRepository
Repository implementation for Google authentication operations.

    Initiates a full sign-in flow requiring user interaction.

    Attempts a quick sign-in using cached credentials without user interaction.

    • signInQuickly

      public CompletableFuture<com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenCredential> signInQuickly(Activity activity)
      Description copied from interface: GoogleAuthRepository
      Attempts a quick sign-in using cached credentials without user interaction.
      Specified by:
      signInQuickly in interface GoogleAuthRepository
      Parameters:
      activity - the activity context for the sign-in operation
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the Google ID token credential

      Initiates a full sign-in flow requiring user interaction.

    • refreshToken

      public CompletableFuture<com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenCredential> refreshToken(Activity activity, com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenCredential credential)
      Description copied from interface: GoogleAuthRepository
      Refreshes an existing Google ID token credential.
      Specified by:
      refreshToken in interface GoogleAuthRepository
      Parameters:
      activity - the activity context for the refresh operation
      credential - the credential to refresh
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the refreshed credential

    • signOut

      public CompletableFuture<Void> signOut()
      Description copied from interface: GoogleAuthRepository
      Signs out the current user.
      Specified by:
      signOut in interface GoogleAuthRepository
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture that completes when the sign-out finishes
